hero.headline2: The Open Standard for Verifiable AI Governance.
hero.subtitle1: Cryptographically proving AI compliance with the EU AI Act
hero.byline: RFC 8785 (JCS) · Ed25519 Signatures · Monotonic Sequencing · EU AI Act Articles 12, 14, 15

problem.headline: Regulators Demand Transparency.
problem.subtitle: AI companies are trapped between regulatory demands and commercial survival. Every existing path leads to a dead end.
problem.card1Desc: The EU AI Act requires full auditability of AI decision-making. Articles 11–15 demand technical documentation, logging, and human oversight.
problem.card2Desc: Model weights are the crown jewels. Disclosing them destroys competitive advantage and invites IP theft. No company will comply voluntarily.
problem.card3Desc: Zero-Knowledge Machine Learning can prove compliance without disclosure — but generating a ZK proof for every AI output is economically impossible at scale.
problem.card4Desc: Prove you're compliant without revealing how your AI works. Current solutions are either too expensive, too slow, or too invasive. Apex eliminates the paradox entirely.

solution.headline: Proof of Sovereign Integrity
solution.subtitle: An Optimistic ZKML architecture that reduces compliance costs by 99.9% while satisfying every regulatory requirement.
solution.feat1Desc: Assume compliant until challenged. Like optimistic rollups in blockchain — your AI outputs are 'innocent until proven guilty.'
solution.feat2Desc: Only generate expensive ZK proofs when a regulator specifically challenges an output. 99.9% of outputs never need one.
solution.feat3Desc: Every AI decision logged cryptographically with SHA-256 hash chains. Tamper-proof, regulator-readable, IP-preserving.
solution.feat4Desc: Automated EU AI Act Annex III categorization. Instantly classify your AI systems by risk tier with regulatory precision.
solution.feat5Desc: Automated Article 11 technical documentation. Generate compliant policies, risk assessments, and audit-ready reports.
solution.feat6Desc: Designed for future Zero-Knowledge integration. As ZK technology matures, PSI seamlessly upgrades from optimistic to full ZK verification.

howItWorks.subtitle: Four Steps to Compliance
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload your AI model's inference hash. No weights or proprietary data revealed.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our distributed network verifies compliance without seeing your model.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive your EU AI Act compliant certificate (Articles 12–15).
howItWorks.step4Desc: Continuous monitoring and automatic alerts for ongoing compliance.

pricing.headline: Scale Compliance With Your Ambition
pricing.subtitle: From startups to sovereigns. Choose the tier that matches your scale.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is Proof of Sovereign Integrity (PSI)?
faq.a1: PSI is an Optimistic ZKML architecture. Instead of generating expensive Zero-Knowledge proofs for every AI output, PSI assumes compliance by default and only generates targeted proofs when a regulator challenges a specific output — reducing costs by 99.9%.
faq.q2: How is this different from traditional ZKML?
faq.a2: Traditional ZKML generates a ZK proof for every single AI output, costing $1,000+ each — economically impossible at scale. PSI uses an optimistic model inspired by blockchain rollups: outputs are logged in an immutable ledger and only proven when challenged.
faq.q3: What is the EU AI Act enforcement date?
faq.a3: August 2, 2026. After this date, non-compliance can result in fines of €35 million or 7% of global turnover, whichever is higher.
faq.q4: Do I need to disclose my model weights?
faq.a4: No. PSI uses Zero-Knowledge proofs to verify compliance without ever exposing your model weights, training data, or proprietary architecture. Your IP remains completely sovereign.
faq.q5: What EU AI Act articles does PSI cover?
faq.a5: PSI provides compliance coverage for Articles 11 (Technical Documentation), 12 (Record-Keeping), 13 (Transparency), 14 (Human Oversight), and 15 (Accuracy & Robustness).
faq.a6: No. Apex provides technical compliance tools and infrastructure. We are not a law firm and do not provide legal advice. Our tools assist with regulatory compliance — consult qualified legal counsel for legal matters.
faq.a7: Request a Compliance Consultation via our contact form. We'll assess your AI systems and present a tailored PSI deployment plan.
